labs.name: Chain Thunder
labs.unlock: Unlocks lab in Milestone at tier 16 wave 60. Enemy Damage reduced by 10% for every 6% of health an enemy lost from Chain Lightning Damage up to a max percent. Has 30 levels increasing max reduction by 3% per level for a max reduction of 90%.

labs.name: Chrono Field Damage Reduction
labs.unlock: Unlocks Chrono Field Reduction % after completion. The reduction is taken on the enemy damage after [[Defense Absolute|defense absolute]] is calculated.

labs.name: Lightning Amplifier - Scatter
labs.unlock: Unlock Lab in Milestones on tier 16 wave 60. Increases damage chain lightning damage done to scatters by each consecutive hit as an additive bonus. This means all values will be 1+ higher than shown to add to the original 1x damage from the first hit.

labs.name: Missile Barrage
labs.unlock: Unlock missile barrage. Once per run launch a barrage of missiles at the same time. This ability is manually activated during a round with a base amount of 20 missiles. Has 1 level. Unlocks Missile Barrage Quantity after completion.

labs.name: Missiles Explosion
labs.unlock: Unlocks Missile Radius after completion. Starting radius is 0.30.

labs.name: Missiles Radius
labs.unlock: Unlocked after Missile Explosion. Increase the radius of the missiles explosion. Has 20 levels.

labs.name: Poison Swamp Stun
labs.unlock: Unlocks Swamp Stun Chance and Swamp Stun Time after completion. Starts with a 5% chance to stun for 1 second.

labs.name: Spotlight Missiles
labs.unlock: unlocked, they will do the base damage of 14x. When the lab is unlocked in milestones, the display will show that missiles are fired every 20 seconds. Spotlight will not fire missiles until the first level is unlocked and frequency is 19 seconds. Has 18 levels.

labs.name: Swamp Rend - Additional Enemies
labs.unlock: Unlock lab in Milestones on tier 16 wave 50. Allows Swamp Rend to apply to other enemy types. Enemies will receive the same % effect as basics. Has 6 levels.

labs.name: Swamp Rend - Basic Enemies
labs.unlock: Unlock lab in Milestones at tier 16 wave 50. When basic enemies are hurt by poison swamp, damage is increased by a percent of currently applied rend. Has 30 levels with each level increasing the percent of rend by 3% for a total of 90%. The lab can apply to other enemy types by upgrading Swamp Rend - Additional Enemies.

labs.name: Swamp Stun Chance
labs.unlock: Unlocked after completing Poison Swamp Stun. Increases the chance enemies are stunned by Poison Swamp. Has 30 levels.

labs.name: Swamp Stun Time
labs.unlock: Unlocked after completing Poison Swamp Stun. Increases the duration enemies are stunned by Poison Swamp. Has 30 levels.
